name: Microwave Play Dough
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Microwave on High power for 6 minutes, stirring every minute until the dough is warm and pliable.
3. Turn the mixture onto a countertop and knead until smooth.
4. Divide the dough into sections and knead in food colorings if desired.
5. Store the play dough in an airtight container.
6. It will keep for months.
